desc.title: OS for predictable and reliable mission-critical solutions with reduced latency
desc.p: The business success of many organizations depends on high availability and responsiveness of their enterprise IT systems. SUSE Linux Enterprise Real Time is an open-source, real-time operating system designed to reduce latency and increase the predictability and reliability of time-sensitive, business-critical applications. If your business can respond quicker to new information and changing market conditions, you have a distinct advantage over those that cannot. Running your time‐sensitive business‐critical applications using SUSE Linux Enterprise Real Time reduces process dispatch latencies and gives you the time advantage you need to increase profits or avoid further financial losses—ahead of your competitors.
